title: ziziphora capitata subsp. orientalis
intro: Ziziphora capitata subsp. orientalis, also known as Eastern Purple-Pennycress, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to the mountainous regions of the Middle East and Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ziziphora capitata subsp. orientalis include alleviating respiratory problems, such as colds and coughs, as well as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
